articles.author: Brian
articles.title: Nintendo announces Switch 2 price increase, going into effect worldwide - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: Nintendo is increasing the price of Switch 2 worldwide, the company has announced. In the U.S. and Canada, the system is going up by $50. Europe will essentially see the console rise by €30. Over in Japan, Nintendo Switch 2 will increase by 10,000 yen, and th…
articles.content:
Nintendo is increasing the price of Switch 2 worldwide, the company has announced.
In the U.S. and Canada, the system is going up by $50. Europe will essentially see the console rise by 30. Over in … [+756 chars]
